mapper.select: select count(1) from comments where article_id = #{articleId}
select count(1) from article_favorites where article_id = #{articleId}

select A.id articleId, A.slug articleSlug, A.title articleTitle, A.description articleDescription, A.created_at articleCreatedAt, count(AF.user_id) as favoriteCount from articles A inner join article_favorites AF on A.id = AF.article_id where A.created_at >= #{since} group by A.id, A.slug, A.title, A.description, A.created_at order by favoriteCount desc limit #{limit}
